AI is making scams more convincing and easier to scale, including impersonation, romance scams, and deepfake abuse. Learn the red flags to watch for and the simple habits that protect your accounts, your phone, and your privacy:

You have almost certainly seen these AI crypto scam videos in the replies.

I got curious and wanted to take a look at how the scam works.

Set up a new wallet, and was ready to let them scam me.

But I was shocked how low effort it was…

We are only at the foothills of the deep‑fake era and it is going to get a lot worse.
